MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER WILLIAM DEMATTEI Motion for Writ of Mandamus Pursuant to CCP section 1094.5. Appearances: Michael S. Hebel, Esq. Attorney at Law, (415) 861-0211 appearing for Petitioner and Moving party; Nancy J. Tavernit, Deputy City Attorney, CCSF, (415) 554-3961 appearing for Respondent, S.F. Retirement Board and opposing party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion is Denied. Weight of evidence supports Administrative Law Judge's decision.
